Visa requirements for citizens of North Macedonia

  • Қазақша

Appearance
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
Administrative entry restrictions

Visa requirements for citizens of North Macedonia are administrative entry restrictions by the authorities of other states placed on citizens of North Macedonia.

As of 2025, citizens of North Macedonia had visa-free or visa on arrival access to 129 countries and territories, ranking the North Macedonian passport 41st in the world, according to the Henley Passport Index.[1]

Visa requirements map

[edit]

Visa requirements

[edit]
Country Visa requirement Allowed stay Notes (excluding departure fees) Reciprocity
Afghanistan Visa required[2] √
Albania Visa not required[3] 90 days
  • ID card valid.
  • 90 days within any 180 day period.
 √
Algeria Visa required[4] √
Andorra Visa not required[5] √
Angola Visa required[6] √
Antigua and Barbuda eVisa[7][8]
  • Negotiations to abolish visa requirements are currently in progress
  • Permanent residents of the United States and Canada and holders of valid visas of the United States, Canada, Schengen Area and the United Kingdom do not require a visa.
 X
Argentina Visa not required[9] 90 days √
Armenia eVisa / Visa on arrival[10][11] 120 days X
Australia Online Visa required[12][13]
  • Online Visitor e600 visa.
 X
Austria Visa not required[14] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Azerbaijan eVisa[15][16] 30 days X
Bahamas Visa not required[17] 3 months √
Bahrain eVisa[18] 14 days √
Bangladesh Visa on arrival[19] 30 days
  • Not available at all entry points.[20]
 X
Barbados Visa not required[21] 90 days X
Belarus Visa not required[22] 30 days[22]
  • Visa-free until 31 December 2024.[22]
 √
Belgium Visa not required[23] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Belize Visa required[24]
  • Visa not required for A max. stay of 90 days for holders of a valid visa issued by a Schengen Member.
  • Holders of a valid multiple entry visa issued by the USA can obtain a visa on arrival.
 √
Benin eVisa[25][26] 30 days
  • Must have an international vaccination certificate.
 X
Bhutan eVisa[27][28]
  • Pre-approved visa can be picked up on arrival.
 √
Bolivia Online Visa / Visa on arrival[29] 30 days[30] X
Bosnia and Herzegovina Visa not required[31] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 6-month period.
  • ID card valid.
 √
Botswana eVisa[32][33] 3 months X
Brazil Visa not required[34] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period.
 √
Brunei Visa required[35] X
Bulgaria Visa not required[36] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Burkina Faso eVisa[37][38] √
Burundi Visa on arrival[39] 1 month √
Cambodia eVisa / Visa on arrival[40][41] 30 days X
Cameroon eVisa[42][43]
  • Pre-approved visa can be picked up on arrival.
 √
Canada Visa required[44]
  • Visa not required for permanent residents of the United States.[45]
 X
Cape Verde Visa on arrival[46]
  • Not available at all entry points.[47]
 X
Central African Republic Visa required[48] √
Chad eVisa[49][50][51] √
Chile Visa not required[52] 90 days √
China Visa not required[53] 30 days
  • Visa-free from 30 November, 2024 to 31 December, 2026.
  • 240-hour (10-day) visa-free transit to a third country or region (including Hong Kong, Macau or Taiwan) using any mode of transport. Must have a confirmed onward ticket/itinerary, and enter through 1 of 64 approved ports.
    • During which, may freely travel within the 24 provinces permitted for visa-free transit and engage in tourism, business, and visits.[54]
  • 24-hour visa-free transit to a third country or region (including Hong Kong, Macau, and Taiwan), is available at most international airports, without leaving the airport.[54]
    • Travellers who need to leave the airport may obtain a temporary entry permit from immigration.[54]
  • 5-day port visa (Visa on Arrival) for Shenzhen if arriving at designated ports of entry from Hong Kong by land or sea, for stays within Shenzhen.
  • 3-day port visa (Visa on Arrival) if arriving in Zhuhai or Xiamen at designated ports of entry, for stays within the respective city.
  • 15-day visa-free entry for cruise ship passengers in tour groups, if arriving at any cruise port along China's coastline, including but not limited to Tianjin; Dalian; Shanghai; Lianyungang; Wenzhou; Zhoushan; Xiamen; Qingdao; Guangzhou; Shenzhen; Beihai; Haikou; Sanya. May further travel inland to all regions of coastal provinces (and equivalents) and Beijing.[55]
  • May apply for a port visa (Visa on Arrival) if travelling for an urgent, qualified reason. Prior clearance for port visa is highly recommended or may be denied boarding by airlines.[56]
  • Visa not required for holders of normal North Macedonia passports endorsed "on business".
 ✔️
Colombia Visa not required[57] √
Comoros Visa on arrival[58] 45 days X
Republic of the Congo eVisa[59][60] √
Democratic Republic of the Congo eVisa[61][62] 7 days √
Costa Rica Visa required[63]
  • Visa not required for holders of a visa issued by the USA (except for B1, B2, C1 and D visas), provided valid for at least 6 months from date of arrival.
  • Additionally a max. stay of 30 days is allowed for residents of Canada or an EU Member provided the residence is valid for at least 6 months on arrival.
 X
Côte d'Ivoire eVisa[64][65] 3 months
  • e-Visa holders must arrive via Port Bouet Airport.
 X
Croatia Visa not required[66] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period.[Note 1]
 √
Cuba Visa required[67] √
Cyprus Visa not required[68] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Czech Republic Visa not required[69] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Denmark Visa not required[70] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Djibouti eVisa[71][72] 90 days X
Dominica Visa not required[73] 21 days X
Dominican Republic Visa not required[74] 90 days X
Ecuador Visa not required[75] 90 days X
Egypt eVisa / Visa on arrival[76][77] 30 days X
El Salvador Visa not required[78] 180 days √
Equatorial Guinea eVisa[79][80] √
Eritrea Visa required[81]
  • Pre-approved visa can be picked up on arrival.
 √
Estonia Visa not required[82] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Eswatini Visa required[83] X
Ethiopia eVisa / Visa on arrival[84][85] up to 90 days
  • e-Visa holders must arrive via Addis Ababa Bole International Airport
 X
Fiji eVisa[86][87] √
Finland Visa not required[88] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
France Visa not required[89] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Gabon eVisa[90][91] 90 days
  • e-Visa holders must arrive via Libreville International Airport.
 X
Gambia Visa required[92] X
Georgia Visa not required[93] 90 days √
Germany Visa not required[94] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Ghana Visa required[95] √
Greece Visa not required[96] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Grenada Visa on arrival[97] 3 months X
Guatemala Visa not required[98] 90 days √
Guinea eVisa[99][100] 90 days X
Guinea-Bissau Visa on arrival[101] 90 days X
Guyana Visa required[102] √
Haiti Visa not required[103] 90 days X
Honduras Visa not required[104] 90 days √
Hungary Visa not required[105] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Iceland Visa not required[106] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
India eVisa[107] 60 days
  • e-Visa holders must arrive via 32 designated airports[Note 2] or 5 designated seaports.[Note 3][108]
  • An Indian e-Tourist Visa may only be obtained twice within 1 calendar year.[109]
  • Foreigners of Pakistani origin or who hold a Pakistani Passport are not eligible for an e-Visa. Foreigners who are not Pakistani nationals, but whose parents or grandparents (either paternal or maternal) were born in, or were permanent residents in Pakistan, are also not eligible for an e-Visa.[110]
 X
Indonesia eVisa[111][112] 60 days X
Iran eVisa[113][114] 30 days X
Iraq eVisa[115] X
Ireland Visa required[116]
  • Visa is issued free of charge.[117]
  • Visa waiver for UK 'C' visa holders. Entry permitted only if first point of entry to the Common Travel Area is in the UK.[118]
 X
Israel ETA-IL[119][120] 90 days √
Italy Visa not required[121] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Jamaica Visa on arrival[122] 30 days X
Japan Visa not required[123] 90 days √
Jordan eVisa / Visa on arrival[124][125] 30 days
  • Visa can be obtained upon arrival, it will cost a total of 40 JOD, obtainable at most international ports of entry and land border crossings. (except King Hussein/Allenby Bridge)
 X
Kazakhstan eVisa[126][127] X
Kenya Electronic Travel Authorisation[128][129] 90 days
  • Applications can be submitted up to 90 days prior to travel and must be submitted at least 3 days in advance.
  • eTA fee is USD 32.50.
  • Proof of reservation at the hotel where visitors plan to stay is required (if staying with friends, an invitation letter is also acceptable).
  • Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries.
 X
Kiribati Visa required[130] √
North Korea Visa required[131] √
South Korea Visa required[132] X
Kuwait Visa required[133] √
Kyrgyzstan Visa not required[134][135] 60 days
  • Visa on arrival available at Manas International Airport.
  • e-Visa holders must arrive via Manas International Airport or Osh Airport or through land crossings with China (at Irkeshtam and Torugart), Kazakhstan (at Ak-jol, Ak-Tilek, Chaldybar, Chon-Kapka), Tajikistan (at Bor-Dobo, Kulundu, Kyzyl-Bel) and Uzbekistan (at Dostuk).
 X
Laos eVisa / Visa on arrival[136] 30 days
  • 18[Note 4] of the 33 border crossings are only open to regular visa holders.[137]
  • e-Visa may be used to enter Laos through the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 3 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges[Note 5], in Boten (road and railroad), and in Vientiane (at Khamsavath railway station).[137]
  • Visa on arrival is available at the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 4 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges[Note 6] and 7 border crossings.[Note 7][137]
 X
Latvia Visa not required[134] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Lebanon Free Visa on arrival[138] 1 month
  • Extendable for 2 additional months
  • Granted free of charge at Beirut International Airport or any other port of entry if there is no Israeli visa or seal, holding a telephone number, an address in Lebanon, and a non refundable return or circle trip ticket.
 X
Lesotho eVisa[139][140] X
Liberia eVisa[141][142][143]
  • Pre-approved visa can be picked up on arrival.
 √
Libya eVisa[144][145] √
Liechtenstein Visa not required[146] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Lithuania Visa not required[147] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Luxembourg Visa not required[148] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Madagascar eVisa/Visa on arrival[149][150] 60 days X
Malawi eVisa / Visa on arrival[151][152] 90 days X
Malaysia Visa not required[153] 30 days √
Maldives Free visa on arrival[154] 30 days X
Mali Visa required[155] √
Malta Visa not required[156] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Marshall Islands Visa on arrival[157] 90 days X
Mauritania eVisa[158][159]
  • Available at Nouakchott–Oumtounsy International Airport.
 X
Mauritius Visa on arrival[160] 60 days √
Mexico Visa required[161]
  • Visa not required for holders of a valid visa issued by the US and permanent residents of the European Union.
 X
Micronesia Visa not required[162] 30 days X
Moldova Visa not required[163] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period.
 √
Monaco Visa not required[164] √
Mongolia eVisa[165][166] 30 days √
Montenegro Visa not required[167] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period.
  • Biometric ID card valid for 30 days
 √
Morocco Visa required[168]
  • Holders of valid visa of the United States can apply for e-Visa.[169]
 √
Mozambique eVisa / Visa on arrival[170][171] 30 days X
Myanmar Visa required[172] √
Namibia Visa required[173] √
Nauru Visa required[174] √
  Nepal Online Visa / Visa on arrival[175] 90 days[176] X
Netherlands Visa not required[177] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1] (European Netherlands)
 √
New Zealand Visa required[178]
  • Holders of an Australian Permanent Resident Visa or Resident Return Visa may be granted a New Zealand Resident Visa on arrival permitting indefinite stay (pursuant to the Trans-Tasman Travel Arrangement), subject to meeting character requirements and obtaining an Electronic Travel Authority prior to departure.[179]
 X
Nicaragua Visa required[180] X
Niger Visa required[181] √
Nigeria eVisa[182][183] 90 days √
Norway Visa not required[184] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Oman Visa not required / eVisa[185][186] 14 days / 30 days X
Pakistan eVisa[187] 90 days X
Palau Free visa on arrival[188] 30 days X
Panama Visa not required[189] 90 days X
Papua New Guinea eVisa[190][191] 60 days
  • Visitors may apply for a visa online under the "Tourist - Own Itinerary" category.
 √
Paraguay Visa required[192] X
Peru Visa not required[193] 183 days √
Philippines Visa required[194]
  • Residents of the United Arab Emirates may obtain an eVisa through the official Philippine eVisa website. A valid Emirati residence visa must be shown upon an eVisa application.[195][196]
 √
Poland Visa not required[197] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Portugal Visa not required[198] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Qatar Visa not required[199] 30 days X
Romania Visa not required[200] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Russia Visa not required (conditional) / eVisa[201][202] 30 days / 16 days
  • Visa free for holders a letter of invitation or a tourist voucher only.
 √
Rwanda Visa not required[203] 30 days X
Saint Kitts and Nevis Electronic Travel Authorisation[204][205] √
Saint Lucia Visa required[206] √
Saint Vincent and the Grenadines Visa not required[207] 3 months X
Samoa Visa not required[208] 60 days X
San Marino Visa not required[209] √
São Tomé and Príncipe eVisa[210][211] X
Saudi Arabia Visa required[212] √
Senegal Visa required[213] X
Serbia Visa not required[214] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period.
  • ID card valid.
 √
Seychelles Electronic Border System[215][216] 3 months
  • Application can be submitted up to 30 days before travel.
  • Visitors must upload a reservation confirmation(s) for each visitor's location of stay in Seychelles.
  • Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries.
  • Payment of the fee (EUR 10) by credit or debit card.
  • Valid for one journey only and it expires once exit the country.
 √
Sierra Leone eVisa[217][218] 3 months
  • Pre-approved visa can be picked up on arrival.
 √
Singapore Visa not required[219] 30 days √
Slovakia Visa not required[220] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Slovenia Visa not required[221] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Solomon Islands Visa required[222] √
Somalia eVisa[223][224] 30 days
  • Available at Bosaso Airport, Galcaio Airport and Mogadishu Airport.
 √
South Africa Visa required[225] √
South Sudan eVisa[226][227]
  • Obtainable online.
  • Printed visa authorization must be presented at the time of travel.
 X
Spain Visa not required[228] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Sri Lanka eVisa / Visa on arrival[229][230] 60 days / 30 days
  • The standard visitor visa allows a stay of 60 days within any 6-month period.[231]
  • Visa fees (for Standard visitor visa):
    • SAARC - USD 35
    • Non SAARC - USD 75
  • e-Visa categories will be charged an additional USD 18.50 service fee.
  • If transiting from any of the Sri Lankan airports, An e-Visa is exempted (2 day transit period).
 X
Sudan eVisa[232][233] √
Suriname Visa not required[234][235] 90 days
  • An entrance fee of USD 50 or EUR 50 must be paid online prior to arrival.[236]
  • Multiple entry e-Visa is also available.[237]
 X
Sweden Visa not required[238] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
 Switzerland Visa not required[239] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 √
Syria eVisa[240][241] X
Tajikistan eVisa[242] 60 days
  • Visa free for visitor are aged 55 and over[243]
 X
Tanzania eVisa / Visa on arrival[244][245] 90 days X
Thailand Visa required[246] √
Timor-Leste Visa on arrival[247] 30 days
  • Not available at all entry points.[248]
 X
Togo eVisa[249][250] 15 days X
Tonga Visa required[251] √
Trinidad and Tobago Visa required[252]
  • Transit visa required.
 √
Tunisia Visa not required[253] 3 months X
Turkey Visa not required[254] 90 days √
Turkmenistan eVisa[255][256]
  • Pre-approved visa can be picked up on arrival.
 √
Tuvalu Visa on arrival[257] 1 month X
Uganda eVisa[258][259] 3 months X
Ukraine Visa not required[260] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period.
 X
United Arab Emirates Visa not required[261] 90 days
  • From April 2025
 X
United Kingdom Visa required[262]
  • Travelers do not require a Direct Airside Transit (DAT) visa if they hold a valid entry visa for Australia, Canada, New Zealand or the United States, and a valid airline ticket for travel via the United Kingdom, as part of a journey to or from one of those countries. Additionally permanent residents of the European Union, Australia, Canada and New Zealand do not require a Direct Airside Transit visa.
 X
United States Visa required[263] X
Uruguay Visa required[264] X
Uzbekistan eVisa[265][266] 30 days
  • 5-day visa-free transit at the international airports if holding a confirmed onward ticket for a flight to a third country.[267]
 X
Vanuatu eVisa[268][269] √
Vatican City Visa not required[270] √
Venezuela Visa required[271] √
Vietnam eVisa[272][273] 90 days
  • Visa free when visit Phu Quoc Island
 X
Yemen Visa required[274] √
Zambia eVisa / Visa on arrival[275][276] 90 days X
Zimbabwe eVisa[277][278] 3 months X

Unrecognized or partially recognized countries

[edit]
Countries Conditions of access Notes
Abkhazia Visa required[279]
Kosovo Visa not required[280] 90 days, ID card valid
Northern Cyprus Visa not required[281] 90 days
Palestine Visa not required[282] Access to Gaza Strip severely restricted.
Sahrawi Arab Democratic Republic Undefined visa regime in the Sahrawi Arab Democratic Republic
South Ossetia Visa not required[283] Must notify about arrival in advance.
Taiwan Visa not required[284] 90 days, temporarily policy until 31 March 2030.
Transnistria Visa not required[285] Registration required after 24 hours.

Dependent and autonomous territories

[edit]
Countries Conditions of access Notes
United Kingdom
Anguilla Visa required[286]
Bermuda Visa required[287]
British Virgin Islands Visa required[288]
Cayman Islands Visa required[289]
Falkland Islands Visa required[290]
Gibraltar Visa required[291]
Guernsey Visa required[292]
Isle of Man Visa required[293]
Jersey Visa required[294]
Montserrat eVisa[295]
Turks and Caicos Islands Visa required
Saint Helena eVisa[296]
China
Hong Kong Visa not required 14 days[297]
Macau Visa not required 90 days[298]
Denmark
Faroe Islands Visa not required[299] 90 days
Greenland Visa not required[300] 90 days
Netherlands
Aruba Visa not required[301] 30 days
Caribbean Netherlands Visa not required[302] 90 days; includes Bonaire, Sint Eustatius and Saba
Curaçao Visa not required[303] 90 days
Sint Maarten Visa not required[304] 90 days
France
French Guiana Visa not required[305] 90 days
French Polynesia Visa not required[306] 90 days
French West Indies Visa not required[307] 90 days; includes overseas departments of Guadeloupe and Martinique and overseas collectivities of Saint Martin and Saint Barthélemy
Mayotte Visa not required[308] 90 days
New Caledonia Visa not required[309] 90 days
Réunion Visa not required[310] 90 days
Saint Pierre and Miquelon Visa not required[311] 90 days
Wallis and Futuna Visa not required[311] 90 days
New Zealand
Cook Islands Visa not required 31 days[312]
Niue Visa not required 30 days[313]
Tokelau Entry permit required[314]
South Korea
Jeju Special Autonomous Province Visa not required[315] 30 days
United States
American Samoa Visa required[316]
Guam Visa required[317]
Northern Mariana Islands Visa required[318]
U.S. Virgin Islands Visa required[319]
Puerto Rico Visa required[320]

  27. ^ Visa, Tourism Council of Bhutan.
  28. ^ "Bhutan eVisa".

  32. ^ Requirements for visa application, Government of Botswana.
  33. ^ "Botswana eVisa".
  34. ^ Visas to travel to Brazil, Ministry of External Relations of Brazil (in Portuguese and English).

  36. ^ Visa for Bulgaria, Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Bulgaria.

  39. ^ International Air Transport Association (IATA), Travel Information Manual
  40. ^ International Air Transport Association (IATA), Travel Information Manual
  41. ^ "Cambodia eVisa".
  42. ^ International Air Transport Association (IATA), Travel Information Manual
  43. ^ "Cameroon eVisa".

Historical
  • Artsakh7
  • Russia2

1 British Overseas Territories. 2 These countries span the conventional boundary between Europe and Asia. 3 Partially recognized. 4 Unincorporated territory of the United States. 5 Part of the Kingdom of Denmark. 6 Egypt spans the boundary between Africa and Asia. 7 Unrecognized state.

1 British Overseas Territories. 2 Azerbaijan, Georgia, Turkey, Kazakhstan, Russia and the partially recognised republics of Abkhazia and South Ossetia each span the conventional boundary between Europe and Asia. 3 Cyprus, Armenia, and the partially recognised republic of Northern Cyprus are entirely in Western Asia but have socio-political connections with Europe. 4 Egypt spans the boundary between Africa and Asia. 5 Partially recognized.

Immigration law
